mnemonics: STEALTH TEXT: Steganography Transforms Every Letter And Thought Hiding information in plain sight
keyPoints: Steganography hides the existence of a message within a text carrier
Common techniques include using white space, subtle character formatting (e.g., zero-width characters), and linguistic methods
The goal is covert communication where only the intended recipient knows to look for and how to extract the hidden data
commonMistakes: Confusing steganography (hiding existence of data) with cryptography (scrambling data's meaning)
Using overly complex or obvious methods that make the text look abnormal and raise suspicion
Failing to use a shared key or algorithm, making it impossible for the recipient to reliably extract the hidden message
